message:
fix(sandbox): Use full test path for child process invocation

Fix linux_apply_integration tests to use the complete test path
including the module prefix:

- Add CHILD_TEST_PREFIX constant for module namespace
- Construct full_name by prefixing test_name with module path
- Pass full_name instead of bare test_name to child process

This fixes test isolation issues where the child process couldn't
find the correct test function due to missing module qualification
in the --exact argument.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
